bugs.title: usedPct calculation inverted in UpgradeBanner
bugs.description: dailyBalance is remaining balance, not used amount. Wrong formula showed 0% when 100% used.
bugs.lesson: Always check API response shape — balance ≠ usage

bugs.title: setState called directly in async useEffect — ESLint error
bugs.description: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps + set-state-in-effect rule forbids direct setState in useEffect async body
bugs.correctPattern: useEffect(() => { async function run() { setState(v); } void run(); }, [dep]);
bugs.lesson: Wrap all setState in inner async function inside useEffect

bugs.title: Duplicate route conflict — (dashboard) vs app/ pages
bugs.description: Creating pages in app/(dashboard)/ for routes already defined in app/ causes route conflicts and double rendering
bugs.lesson: Check app/ root before creating new (dashboard) pages. Some routes live outside the group.

bugs.title: motion/react Variants type error with ease string
bugs.description: ease: 'easeOut' assigned to Variants type causes TypeScript error — string not assignable to specific easing union
bugs.lesson: Use 'as const' for motion easing strings in Variants objects

bugs.title: @vercel/flags CVE GHSA-892p-pqrr-hxqr
bugs.description: Critical CVE in @vercel/flags — no fix available, zero imports in codebase
bugs.lesson: Run npm audit regularly. Remove unused packages with CVEs even if no fix exists.

bugs.title: Hardcoded Arabic text in JSX bypasses i18n
bugs.description: Arabic strings embedded directly in JSX instead of using t() from useTranslations() — breaks English locale
bugs.lesson: Always use t() — search for Arabic unicode range U+0600-U+06FF in JSX to find violations
